constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Label wraps input through nested divs without for attribute Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Reference DOM (Aria-labelledby only): Email field identified only via aria-labelledby pointing at hidden span Reference DOM (Multiple forms on page): Newsletter signup form vs job application form - tests primary form detection Reference DOM (Custom div dropdown): Location picked from custom div dropdown, not native select Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: label-wraps-deep, table-layout, div-role-textbox, decoy-form, readonly-prefill. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Aria-labelledby only; Multiple forms on page; Custom div dropdown.
